Tests if `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` is equal to `Infinity`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` is equal to `Infinity` in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to verify this condition, which is a common practice in testing to ensure that the language's built-in constants behave as expected. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating the equivalence of these two representations of positive infinity. It is likely part of a larger test suite that ensures the correctness of JavaScript's numerical constants.
